chapters.title: The Christmas Party
chapters.description: Gabriel arrives at his aunts' annual Christmas party

chapters.title: Conversations and Dancing
chapters.description: Gabriel talks with guests and gives his speech

chapters.title: The Journey Home
chapters.description: Gabriel and Gretta leave the party and go to the hotel

chapters.title: Gretta's Memory
chapters.description: Gretta tells Gabriel about Michael Furey, her first love

chapters.title: Gabriel's Epiphany
chapters.description: Gabriel realizes his wife's true feelings and his own mortality
